notes: A live 2026-04 capture creates a disposable draft order, attaches NET payment terms through paymentTermsCreate, records the cold OrdersDraftOrderHydrate response used by the proxy, then completes the draft without passing paymentPending. Shopify returns PENDING financial status with a manual SALE/PENDING transaction and no successful payment capture, and an immediate order(id:) read returns the same status. Replacement for retired synthetic/local-runtime orders evidence. This scenario ID is preserved for continuity but now reuses the real Shopify capture and proxy request contract from config/parity-specs/orders/draftOrderComplete-payment-terms-pending.json (draftOrderComplete-payment-terms-pending); the old local-runtime cassette is no longer parity evidence.

expectedDifferences.reason: Live Shopify and the local draft proxy allocate different order ids when completing the draft.
Live Shopify and the local draft proxy allocate different order ids when completing the draft.
